description: The European Parliament voted in 2019 to ban a variety of single-use plastic items like cutlery and straws across the EU. This was a centralized legislative effort focused on circular economy goals rather than a grassroots push.

key_events.description: European Commission formalizes the proposal under the Circular Economy Action Plan.
Protests by some hospitality associations regarding implementation timelines.
Parliament votes overwhelmingly in favor of the directive.
Member states begin individual legislative transposition processes.

calibration_notes: Useful for modeling bureaucratic policy adoption where public opinion is largely aligned with expert/political consensus.
